creator: kamikaze@bsdforen.de
text:
On 18/06/2010 23:23, Mark Linimon wrote:
> It appears the current maintainer has been inactive for several years,
> so I've reset him.
> 
> I've made the guess that you might want to be the new maintainer, so I
> committed the change that way :-)  If not, let me know and I'll change
> it to ports@.

All fine with me, thanks for the commit!
